prompt: Add VRP-style static route protocol displays
note: Implemented literal show ip routing-table protocol direct/static command branches, static Active and Inactive sections, inactive-only filtering, verbose route paragraphs, configured route counts, Unknown unresolved interfaces, flags, tags, and persistent route age; 295 tests pass.
decisions: Build static display state by correlating RM_StaticRouteConfig candidates with resolved and active RMRoute entries
Expose only implemented protocol literals and defer matching-output pipeline support
